description: Create Section 2 - Intermediate Workflows (chapters 02-01 through 02-05) with matching SVG illustrations. This section covers skill-building content: core workflow DNA implementation, standard business process walkthroughs (customer onboarding flagship), basic integration setup (tool adapters), process intelligence usage, and collaborative knowledge/memory tools.
steps: Create book/user_guide/chapters/02-01-workflow-dna-implementation.md - Cover Workflow DNA concepts (bounded state graph, steps with agents/tools, memory reads/writes, guardrails, verification checks, rollback plans, fitness metrics). Walk through creating a workflow from scratch using the customer onboarding example (wf_customer_onboarding_v12). Include the full YAML schema explanation, validation with npm run business:validate.

Create book/user_guide/chapters/02-02-business-process-walkthroughs.md - Cover end-to-end execution of the flagship customer onboarding workflow: Run Now with payload (case_id), step execution (verify_contract, create_customer_record, configure_billing, send_welcome_packet), human gate approval for billing, tool_effects tracking, auto-reflect on completion. Include the E1 operator path as a real example.

Create book/user_guide/chapters/02-03-tool-adapter-integration.md - Cover all shipped tool adapters (crm, billing, email, audit, contract_parser, policy_retriever), their configurations, permission scoping, effect tracking (tool_effects), fail-closed behavior, and how to set up basic integrations. Include API examples for tool execution.

Create book/user_guide/chapters/02-04-process-intelligence-usage.md - Cover event log ingestion (POST /api/v1/processes/event-logs), event schema (id, timestamp, actor_type, process_id, case_id, activity, etc.), discovered processes, conformance reports, bottleneck analysis. Walk through PI artifact generation under business/process-intelligence/. Include the PI agents (Process Miner, Conformance, Bottleneck Analyzer).

Create book/user_guide/chapters/02-05-knowledge-memory-collaboration.md - Cover the knowledge layer (tiered retrieval: Tier 0 keyword/embedding, Tier 1 LightRAG graph, Tier 2 RAPTOR summaries), memory types (Event, Episodic, Semantic, Procedural, Decision, Exception, Evaluation, Provenance), knowledge search APIs, memory scope enforcement, document indexing, and K1-lite graph operations.

Create book/user_guide/assets/02-01-workflow-dna-structure.svg - Diagram showing Workflow DNA schema components: steps, agents, tools, memory, guardrails, verification, rollback, fitness metrics. Use the style from book/design_phase/assets/05-workflow-dna.svg as reference.

Create book/user_guide/assets/02-02-onboarding-process-flow.svg - End-to-end flowchart of the customer onboarding workflow: intake -> verify_contract -> create_record -> configure_billing (human gate) -> send_welcome -> audit_log -> auto_reflect.

Create book/user_guide/assets/02-03-tool-adapter-architecture.svg - Data flow diagram showing how tool adapters work: request -> permission check -> adapter execution -> tool_effects capture -> audit log -> response.

Create book/user_guide/assets/02-04-process-intelligence-pipeline.svg - Pipeline diagram: event ingestion -> storage -> process discovery -> conformance check -> bottleneck analysis -> artifact output to business/process-intelligence/.

Create book/user_guide/assets/02-05-knowledge-memory-tiers.svg - Layered diagram showing the three retrieval tiers (Tier 0 vector, Tier 1 graph, Tier 2 RAPTOR), memory types, and provenance layer wrapping everything.
Embed SVG references in each chapter with proper relative paths and descriptive alt text.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 chapter files exist in book/user_guide/chapters/ with naming 02-0N-*.md
All 5 SVG files exist in book/user_guide/assets/ with naming 02-0N-*.svg
Each chapter contains: title, learning objectives, prerequisites, numbered step-by-step instructions, technical explanations, 2-3 real-world use cases, best practices, summary, knowledge check quiz
Workflow DNA content accurately reflects the schema from structure.md section 4.1
Process Intelligence content matches docs/process-intelligence.md APIs and artifact paths
Knowledge/Memory content accurately describes the tiered retrieval from structure.md section 3.4
All SVGs follow the established style (960px viewBox, Segoe UI, colored boxes, WCAG colors)
All markdown SVG references use valid relative paths
verification: Confirm all files exist: ls book/user_guide/chapters/02-*.md book/user_guide/assets/02-*.svg
Verify SVG files are valid XML
Verify all internal links resolve correctly
findings: All 10 files created successfully (5 chapters + 5 SVGs). SVGs validated as proper XML with correct viewBox (960px width), Segoe UI font-family, white backgrounds, rx=8 rounded corners, and arrow markers. All markdown SVG references use correct relative paths (../assets/02-0N-*.svg). Each chapter includes all required sections: learning objectives, prerequisites, numbered step-by-step instructions, real-world use cases (3+ per chapter), best practices, chapter summary, and knowledge check quiz (6-7 questions each). Line counts: 669-835 per chapter (3734 total). Content accurately reflects source docs: workflow DNA schema from structure.md section 4.1, PI APIs and artifact paths from docs/process-intelligence.md, tiered retrieval from structure.md section 3.4, E1 operator path from docs/usage.md.
